text.title: Agents Production Deployment — Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from input brief to signed-off output config.

list.item: Input: Existing agent code.
Action: List all tools; mark untyped vs typed.
Output: tools-audit.csv with status per tool.
Decision gate: If > 50% untyped, prioritise typing before any other gate.
Input: Existing config reads.
Action: Move to YAML; introduce a Config class; replace os.environ scatter.
Output: config/agent.yaml + config.py.
Decision gate: If env vars have secrets, integrate with secret manager.
Input: Logging library.
Action: Wrap LLM + tool call sites; emit structured rows; pipe to log aggregator.
Output: JSON logs visible in Loki / Datadog / Langfuse.
Decision gate: If aggregator not available, write to file with rotation.
Input: External call sites.
Action: Wrap with tenacity + pybreaker (or equivalent); configure timeouts.
Output: All external calls have retry + circuit.
Decision gate: If circuit trips too often, raise the threshold or fix the upstream issue.
Input: Eval prompts + expected outputs.
Action: Author harness; integrate with CI; nightly run; alert on regression.
Output: CI gate + nightly dashboard.
Decision gate: If eval is slow, run a subset on PRs and full suite nightly.
